seoTitle: Mount Cooper vs Mount Darragh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Cooper and Mount Darragh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Cooper vs Mount Darragh: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Cooper and Mount Darragh.
heading: Mount Cooper vs Mount Darragh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Cooper, New South Wales and Mount Darragh, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Darragh has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Mount Cooper (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Cooper or Mount Darragh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Cooper has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mount Darragh scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Cooper scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Darragh scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Cooper or Mount Darragh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Darragh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
